text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Thanks for volunteering to help keep our community safe and welcoming! 🎉
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You're all set as a member. Feel free to explore and introduce yourself! 🎉
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You're now an event helper. Looking forward to your help with community events! 🎉
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be invaluable to our newer members! 🎉
